name: Black and Blue Berry Cobbler
recipeIngredient: 3 cups black berries and blueberries, mixed
recipeInstructions:
1. Stir sugar and water over medium heat until sugar dissolves. Add vanilla and lemon juice and set aside.
2. Mix the milk with the dry ingredients (flour, baking powder, and salt).
3. Turn out the mixture onto a floured board and roll into a 9x12-inch rectangle.
4. Spread the berries evenly over the dough.
5. Roll up the dough from one long side to the other, then slice into 12 pieces.
6. Melt 1/2 cup butter in a 9 x 13-inch pan.
7. Place the rolls in the pan.
8. Pour the sugar syrup (remaining mixture with vanilla and lemon juice) over the rolls.
9. Bake for one hour at 350 degrees.
NOTE: Apples or peaches may be used instead of berries, but reduce the sugar by half a cup.
